note: Updated quarterly by admin. Contact CHFA or county housing offices to verify availability before advising clients.

CHFA-HTF.name: CHFA Housing Trust Fund
CHFA-HTF.description: CHFA HTF provides gap financing for affordable multifamily projects. Funds are competitive statewide.

CHFA-CCLA.name: CHFA Construction/Permanent Loan Advantage
CHFA-CCLA.description: Below-market first mortgage financing for affordable housing. Available year-round with rolling applications.

DOLA-HTF.name: Colorado DOLA Housing Trust Fund
DOLA-HTF.description: State housing trust fund administered by DOLA. Rural areas receive priority weighting.

CDBG-DR.name: CDBG Disaster Recovery (DOLA)
CDBG-DR.description: Not currently available. Previous round closed. Watch for new HUD allocations.
CDBG-DR.warning: No active round — funds exhausted from 2024 disaster declaration.

Denver-AHTF.name: Denver Affordable Housing Trust Fund
Denver-AHTF.description: City of Denver AHTF — largest local fund in state. Strong preference for deep affordability (30% AMI).

Boulder-HTF.name: Boulder County Housing Trust Fund
Boulder-HTF.description: Boulder County HTF — strong local funding base. Priority: workforce and deep affordability.

HOME-CO.name: HOME Investment Partnerships (State)
HOME-CO.description: Federal HOME funds administered by DOLA. Typically layered with LIHTC. Annual allocations.
